flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 27% at North Carolina Wesleyan University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.2k vs 1.6k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at North Carolina Wesleyan University rose 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($21.2k → $25.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at North Carolina Wesleyan University fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4k → 1.2k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at North Carolina Wesleyan University fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (65.1% → 58.5%).
